an6.105:1.1: "Tayome, bhikkhave, bhavā pahātabbā, tīsu sikkhāsu sikkhitabbaṁ. Katame tayo bhavā pahātabbā? Kāmabhavo, rūpabhavo, arūpabhavo – ime tayo bhavā pahātabbā. Katamāsu tīsu sikkhāsu sikkhitabbaṁ? Adhisīlasikkhāya, adhicittasikkhāya, adhipaññāsikkhāya – imāsu tīsu sikkhāsu sikkhitabbaṁ.
an6.105:1.2:
Yato kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno ime tayo bhavā pahīnā honti, imāsu ca tīsu sikkhāsu sikkhitasikkho hoti – ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, bhikkhu acchecchi taṇhaṁ, vivattayi saṁyojanaṁ, sammā mānābhisamayā antamakāsi dukkhassā"ti.
Dasamaṁ.
